name: cikm-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for CIKM (ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management) submissions: tri-community venue fit across IR, data mining, and knowledge management, five-track routing, EasyChair submission checks, GenAI usage disclosure, review-stage strategy, ACM camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, and workflow. Grounded in the official CIKM 2026 site (Rome, November 7-11, 2026), track CFPs, submission policies, ACM DL proceedings, and dblp, checked on 2026-07-08.
